_header.file_role: provenance sidecar for qwen3_32b.json (E1 anchor fleet)

S2.name: Qwen3 Technical Report, arXiv:2505.09388, Table 1 (Qwen3-32B: 64 layers, 64/8 Q/KV heads, untied embeddings, 128K context)

pretrain_context.source: S2 (native 32K pretraining context; S1 max_position_embeddings 40960 is the shipped max position)

total_params_b.source: computed with AC parameter ledger from S1 dims (attention projections use n_heads*d_head independently of d_model); consistent with the model class (32B)

notes: Qwen3 applies per-head QK RMSNorm (q_norm/k_norm) inside attention; ~16.8M params (~0.05%) are not booked by AC's ledger and the norm is not representable in schema 0.3. Recorded here; not modeled.
Serving anchor will use HF repo Qwen/Qwen3-32B (base), no license gate.
